name: apple-platform-project-setup
description: Plugin for bootstrapping and standardizing Apple platform workspaces with phase-based setup skills.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap Apple workspaces with phase-based setup skills.
interface.longDescription: Bundle of focused skills for Apple workspace discovery, interview, workspace selection, capability install, config, artifact application, AGENTS rendering, and verification.
defaultPrompt: Set up an Apple workspace end to end.
Audit and align an existing Apple repo.
Run the Apple setup flow in order.
